facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.6 stars. 2,107 reviews. Still no line out the door. Saigonese Eatery does Asian fusion the way Phu Quoc actually eats. $15-30 a head. Solid value for what lands on the table. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Asian fusion at $15-30 a head and 2,107 people rated it 4.6 stars. Saigonese Eatery on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Walk in, order everything, thank yourself later.
